assessment.text: Lists chest pain, haemoptysis, cyanosis, inability to speak in sentences, confusion, unilateral leg swelling, stridor, rapid progression, and low oxygen saturation.

source.title: Adult breathlessness pathway (pre-diagnosis): diagnostic pathway support tool
source.population: Adults with chronic persistent breathlessness, primarily symptoms lasting more than eight weeks.
source.exclusions: Exact presentation-level source for chronic adult breathlessness; international only and not directly validated for UAE practice or acute presentations.

exact_location.heading: Diagnostic pathway — red flags

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists chest pain, haemoptysis, cyanosis, inability to speak in sentences, confusion, unilateral leg swelling, stridor, rapid progression, and low oxygen saturation.

assessment.text: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped natriuretic-peptide and echocardiography review fields in an adult heart-failure context.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established chronic heart failure.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult chronic-heart-failure diagnosis, review, monitoring, and clinician-led management; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.12 — history, examination, natriuretic peptides, imaging, ECG, and laboratory tests

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinical history and examination, NT-proBNP, echocardiography, ECG, chest X-ray, renal, thyroid, liver, lipid, glucose, blood count, and urinalysis review.

assessment.text: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.
assessment.rationale: Was reviewed for chronic cardiac monitoring context; no additional generic dyspnoea item is mapped.

source.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults with suspected or established chronic heart failure.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist cardiovascular care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult chronic-heart-failure diagnosis, review, monitoring, and clinician-led management; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.8.1–1.8.5 — clinical monitoring and review

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of functional capacity, fluid status, rhythm, cognition, nutrition, medication, renal function, haemoglobin or iron status, deterioration, monitoring frequency, and support needs.

assessment.text: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped orthopnoea or PND, oedema, JVP, and peripheral-oedema documentation in worsening heart failure.

source.title: Cheshire and Merseyside Heart Failure Pathway
source.jurisdiction: Cheshire and Merseyside, England, United Kingdom
source.population: Adults with diagnosed or suspected heart failure requiring assessment, monitoring, or escalation.
source.setting: Primary, community, acute, and specialist heart-failure services.
source.exclusions: Supporting regional NHS pathway for adult heart-failure deterioration documentation; not a UAE pathway and all treatment content remains clinician-led and unmapped.

exact_location.heading: Assessment of worsening heart failure

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports worsening breathlessness, orthopnoea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnoea, weight increase, oedema or abdominal distension, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen saturation, JVP, pulmonary findings, and peripheral oedema documentation.

assessment.text: Supports documentation of high-risk deterioration and clinician-led urgent referral or escalation without mapping dose-bearing treatment content.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-decided safety-netting and referral documentation for high-risk deterioration.

curation_policy: Direct full-source guideline reconstruction; every legacy item has an auditable comparison and every final clinical item retains exact source provenance.
